name: Vineet Nayar
profileSummary: Vineet Nayar is an Indian businessperson, author, and philanthropist. He served as the Chief Executive Officer of HCL Technologies from 2007 to 2013 and is currently the founder and chairman of the Sampark Foundation, a non-profit organization he established in 2005. Nayar is also the author of the best-selling book, Employees First, Customers Second: Turning Conventional Management Upside Down, published by Harvard Business Review Press in 2010.
